name: mercury
description: Mercury — AI-powered job search companion. CLI + local dashboard for LinkedIn job search, recruiter tracking, profile scoring, and resume tailoring.

scripts.dev: bun run ensure-assets && bun run src/cli/index.ts
scripts.build: bun run gen:version && bun run build:web && bun run embed && bun run build:bin
scripts.build:web: cd web && bun install && bun run build
scripts.build:bin: bun run ensure-assets && bun build src/cli/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/mercury
scripts.build:targets: bun run gen:version && bun run build:web && bun run embed && bun run scripts/build-targets.ts
